## Describe the bug

A clear, short description of what the bug is.

## To reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error (or wrong behavior)

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened (screenshots or console errors if helpful).

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. macOS 14, Windows 11]
- Node version: [e.g. 20.x] (`node -v`)
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 120, Safari 17]
- Supabase: [using Supabase / local only]

## Additional context

Any other details, logs, or steps that might help.
